zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Gascoigne III於大約1404年出生在英國越可爾加福索普時，他的父親Sir William Gascoigne II20歲，母親Joan Wyman20歲。他於1426年2月之前與Margaret Clarell在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1465年在英國越可爾享年63歲，埋葬在英國越可爾希亞活。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Gascoigne III于大约1404年出生在英国越可爾加福索普时，他的父亲Sir William Gascoigne II20岁，母亲Joan Wyman20岁。他于1426年2月之前与Margaret Clarell在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1465年在英国越可爾享年63岁，埋葬在英国越可爾希亞活。

nameMeanings.name: Gascoigne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Gascon, Middle English Gascoun, Gascon ‘Gascon, native of Gascony’ or the adjective Gascuinz ‘of Gascony’. The name of the region derives from that of the Basques, who are found close by and formerly extended into this region as well; they are first named in Roman sources as Vascōnes, but the original meaning of the name derived from a root eusk- in the non-Indo-European language that they still speak today, is completely obscure. By the Middle Ages the Basques had been displaced from most of Gascony by speakers of Gascon (a dialect of Occitan, related to French), who were proverbial for their boastfulness. In the 11th century Gascony united with Aquitaine and was thus held by England between 1154 and 1453.

variants.name: Gascon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Jaime, Mario, Miguel, Rafael, Ruben, Amado, Ana, Ana Maria, Angel, Caridad.  French Andre, Chantal, Jean-Guy, Jean-Philippe, Monique, Serge, Simonne.
French; Spanish (Gascón): habitational name for someone from the province of Gascony, Old French Gascogne (see Gascoigne ). This surname is also found in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Gascoigne III was born about 1404, in Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir William Gascoigne II, was 20 and his mother, Joan Wyman, was 20. He married Margaret Clarell before February 1426, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1465, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Harewood, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Gascoigne III est né environ 1404, à Gawthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Gascoigne II, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joan Wyman, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Clarell avant février 1426, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1465, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Gascoigne III um 1404 in Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Gascoigne II 20 und seine Mutter Joan Wyman 20. Er hat vor Februar 1426 in Yorkshire, England Margaret Clarell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1465 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in Harewood, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Gascoigne III è nato il circa 1404 nel Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Gascoigne II, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Joan Wyman, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Clarell prima del febbraio 1426, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1465, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Harewood, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Gascoigne IIIが約1404年にイギリスヨークシュアイアガウソルペで生まれた時，父Sir William Gascoigne IIは20歳，母Joan Wymanは20歳であった。1426年2月以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアでMargaret Clarellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1465年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで63歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Gascoigne III(이)가 대략 1404년 영국 요르크실르 가w소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Gascoigne II(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Wyman(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1426년 2월 이전 영국 요르크실르에서 Margaret Clarell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1465년 영국 요르크실르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 하레우드에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1405–about 1465: tany ho any amin'ny 1404–tany ho any amin'ny 1465

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Gascoigne III nasceu aproximadamente 1404, em Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Gascoigne II, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Joan Wyman, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Clarell antes fevereiro de 1426, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1465, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Gascoigne III родился около 1404 г. в местности гавтаурп, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Gascoigne II было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Wyman, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Clarell перед февраль 1426 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1465 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Gascoigne III nació aproximadamente 1404, en Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Gascoigne II, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Joan Wyman, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Margaret Clarell antes de febrero de 1426, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1465, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
